nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Micropsitta
nodes.summary: Micropsitta（Micropsitta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Yellow-capped pygmy parrot、Geelvink pygmy parrot、Buff-faced pygmy parrot等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Geelvink pygmy parrot
nodes.summary: Geelvink pygmy parrot（Micropsitta geelvinkiana）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Geelvink pygmy parrot。

nodes.name: Geelvink pygmy parrot
nodes.summary: The Geelvink pygmy parrot (Micropsitta geelvinkiana) is a species of parrot in the family Psittacidae endemic to Biak and Numfoor islands in Western New Guinea. The name Geelvink comes from a Dutch ship and family called Geelvinck. It has two subspecies; the nominate occurs on Numfor, and M. g. misoriensis on Biak. Description It has a brown head, blue crown, light blue ear covert, yellow breast, green body and blue tail. It has red eyes. The female has less brown than the male. Diet It feeds on lichen, fungi, seeds, fruits, flowers, insects and their larvae. Habitat Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and rural gardens. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
